topic: Don’T Give Up On Your English
title_en: DON’T GIVE UP ON YOUR ENGLISH
text_en: Let’s be honest, we all have those days when English feels like a giant puzzle that we just can’t solve. You might forget a simple word or get stuck on a grammar rule you’ve studied a hundred times. When this happens, it’s easy to feel frustrated and want to quit, but please remember that feeling lost is actually a sign of progress. Instead of trying to learn everything at once, why not slow down? Just focus on one small task: write a short message, listen to a catchy song, or read a single paragraph. These tiny steps are what keep you moving forward. Learning a language is not a race; it’s a marathon that requires patience and persistence. So, take a deep breath, stay positive, and you will eventually find your way back on track.
